title: Why Do I Feel So Tired After 40? (The Real Reason Nobody Tells You)
seo_title: Why Do I Feel So Tired After 40?
meta_description: NAD+ levels drop 50% by age 60, causing deep fatigue. Learn the real reason women feel more tired after 40 and what science says about restoring cellular energy.
excerpt: If you feel more exhausted than you did a decade ago, the answer starts at the cellular level. NAD+ decline and mitochondrial dysfunction — not just stress or sleep debt — are the real drivers of fatigue after 40.
tags: energy, NAD+, fatigue, mitochondria, women over 40, longevity, cellular health
author: Dr. Daniel Yadegar, MD
product_bridge: NAD+ Longevity Shot, NAD+ Advanced Protocol
